parameters.apprise_url_plus: nctalks://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Nextcloud Talk destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise nctalks:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native Nextcloud Talk chat message directly to your Nextcloud server's Talk API, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"message":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="" and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Nextcloud Talk server (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Nextcloud Talk destinations, direct

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud Talk host

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud Talk password

roomid_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud Talk room ID; used by the gateway-plus transformer channel

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud Talk targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Nextcloud Talk user
